 FAIL  src/router.test.ts > returns 404 for unknown paths

     32|   const res = router.handle("/nonexistent");
     33|   expect(res.status).toBe(404);
     34|   expect(res.body).toEqual({ error: "Not Found" });
       |                  ^
     35| });
